name: Rollbar
description: Monitor Rollbar error tracking and alert configuration for incident response compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Rollbar at https://rollbar.com
2. Go to your project's Settings > Project Access Tokens
3. Copy a token with 'read' scope
4. Find your Project ID in Settings > General
5. Enter both values below

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Checks Rollbar for critical active errors indicating availability issues

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Verifies Rollbar has notifications configured for incident response
